description: Starter internal retrieval eval cases for job-description documents (JD + optional resume kit source).

cases.query: What is the salary range for this role?
cases.notes: Compensation-style ask query. Should align with section hinting for salary/pay questions.

cases.query: What skills and qualifications are required?
cases.notes: Broad qualifications query that should surface both technical skills and explicit requirements.

cases.query: Which tools and technologies does the team use?
cases.notes: Tooling query aimed at the tools/technologies section.

cases.query: What are the main responsibilities of this role?
cases.notes: Baseline responsibilities retrieval for interview question generation and ask flows.

cases.query: What is the base pay band in USD?
cases.notes: Dense tabular compensation row; tests recall when salary is not in prose form.

cases.query: What is the remote or hybrid work policy?
cases.notes: Location / work arrangement query; should hit about-style policy text.

cases.query: What degree or education is required?
cases.notes: Education gate often lives next to skills; ensures qualifications section surfaces.

cases.query: Who does this role report to?
cases.notes: Reporting-line question; exercises about/company context retrieval.

cases.query: What leadership experience is listed on the resume?
cases.notes: Interview Kit: evidence must come from resume source, not JD chunks.
